description: FLY HIGH ON THE Basketball COURT  Sleek and stylish, the adidas Tip Off is a great basketball shoe that is engineered with a sturdy upper, supportive padding and grippy outsole to help you make quick, sharp and fast moves during an exciting basketball match. The adidas Tip Off comes with a synthetic upper stitched in layers, such that the toe and side panels of the upper are perforated to ensure ample ventilation for the feet. The cushioned and meshed tongue offers a soft, comfortable and breathable Fit, while the synthetic laces ensure a snug, durable fit. The three synthetic overlay strips connecting the lace-up system to the midsole are not only reminiscent of the Adidas trademark of perseverance and performance, but also provide that added support and structure to the midfoot.   Ease of move with max stabilityThe midsole of the Adidas Tip Off shoe is made of lightweight EVA for enhanced cushioning and shock absorption. To add on is a cushioned sockliner to keeps the foot locked in place, providing a snug, comfort fit and supportive padding. Made of grippy rubber, the outsole of the Adidas Tip Off is designed to give you that extra support and traction on various terrains. With comfort overlays along the underfoot arches, this shoe provides that extra support to mild underpronators and overpronators, while the pivot points on the big toe mound and mid heel allows the feet to rotate 180° easily. The leaf pattern grooves along the forefoot and heel provide ample grip and support on smooth courts, while the reinforced toe guard embedded onto the upper provides greater movement and enhances shoe life, making this an absolutely stylish and comfortable basketball sneaker to slip into. UpperSynthetic black uppers with perforations for better breath abilitySynthetic black lace-ups for better fitIconic three stripes symbolizing elegance and durability in silver on the sidesPadded collar and tongue, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole for all day comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing lightweight midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber toe box and heel counter for added protectionDurable outsole with herringbone pattern for high tractionBlack pivot point for better mobilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
